data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified interface promotes faster user decisions.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic chat interface with quick access buttons.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimized touch targets for mobile user interactions.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily tappable icons and buttons.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping related items to enhance perceptual organization for users.
data.technical_spec: Chats, calls, and contacts are clearly organized within sections.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Design respects user's cognitive load limitations.
data.technical_spec: Concise menu options and limited notification clutter.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Familiar interaction patterns to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Adherence to widely accepted chat app designs.
